rationale: Both candidates independently verify the parent-first ordering assumption that Gaohan123 flagged inline, but neither raises Bounty-hunter's specific ask to re-run the diffusion benchmark script. X additionally surfaces CI/precommit status (echoing Gaohan123's 'fix precommit' comment) and does the deeper correctness check that companion outputs aren't silently dropped (verifying CFG companions still reach the diffusion stage via KV-linked request IDs) — a materially important check Y skips. Y is more voluminous with many file/line-cited minor/nit findings (missing mm_data test, unused requires_multimodal_data param, unguarded outputs[0], untested None-prompt branch), giving it a slight actionability edge, but several of its own findings are explicitly non-issues ('No change needed'), diluting value. Overall X shows marginally better recall and deeper root-cause verification, Y is marginally more actionable in raw comment count; net edge to X.
